data.title: Lion Finance Group PLC Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ) has shared an announcement.

Lion Finance Group PLC announced the repurchase of 10,000 ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of its ongoing share buyback and cancellation program. This transaction, executed by Cavendish Capital Markets Limited, is part of a strategic effort to manage the company’s capital structure and enhance shareholder value. The repurchased shares will be held in treasury until their cancellation, which will adjust the total number of shares with voting rights to 44,234,533, impacting shareholder calculations under the FCA’s rules.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc

Lion Finance Group PLC is a FTSE 250 holding company with subsidiaries providing banking and financial services in the high-growth markets of Georgia and Armenia. The company operates through leading universal banks, Bank of Georgia and Ameriabank, focusing on customer-centric services to drive business growth, sustain high profitability, and generate strong returns while contributing positively to the communities they serve.

YTD Price Performance: 9.98%

Average Trading Volume: 74,249

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £2.29B

data.title: XPS Pensions Group Plc Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
XPS Pensions Group Plc ( (GB:XPS) ) has issued an update.

XPS Pensions Group Plc has announced a change in its voting rights structure due to an acquisition or disposal by abrdn plc-affiliated investment management entities. The notification reveals that the total percentage of voting rights held by these entities has decreased from 13.44% to 12.99%, impacting the company’s shareholder composition and potentially influencing future corporate governance decisions.

More about XPS Pensions Group Plc

XPS Pensions Group Plc operates in the UK financial services industry, specializing in pension consulting and administration services. The company focuses on providing comprehensive pension solutions to a wide range of clients, including corporations and pension scheme trustees.

data.title: Manganese X Energy Corp. Reports Promising Ore Sorting Study Results
data.description:
Manganese X Energy Corp ( (TSE:MN) ) has issued an update.

Manganese X Energy Corp. announced positive results from an initial ore sorting study conducted by ABH Engineering Inc. on its Battery Hill manganese deposit in New Brunswick, Canada. These promising results, which showed over 95% effectiveness in sorting valuable rocks from waste, pave the way for a more extensive Phase 2 study and the upcoming Pre-Feasibility Study. The successful implementation of this sorting technology could lead to numerous benefits, including improved project economics, reduced resource consumption, and increased mine life, positioning the company advantageously in the manganese mining industry.

More about Manganese X Energy Corp

Manganese X Energy Corp. is focused on advancing its Battery Hill project to become the first publicly traded manganese mining company in Canada and the US to commercialize EV-compliant high purity manganese. The company aims to supply value-added materials to the lithium-ion battery and other industries, potentially supporting the North American supply chain.

YTD Price Performance: 60.0%

Average Trading Volume: 135,558

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$12.37M

data.title: Ashtead Group Advances Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ) has issued an announcement.

Ashtead Group plc, a company involved in a share repurchase program, announced the repurchase of 85,000 of its ordinary shares on March 12, 2025, as part of its $1.5 billion share buyback initiative. The shares were bought at an average price of 4,323 pence per share, with the lowest and highest prices being 4,283 pence and 4,379 pence, respectively. Following this transaction, the total number of ordinary shares in issue stands at 434,221,383, excluding treasury shares. This transaction is part of Ashtead’s ongoing efforts to manage its capital structure and could impact shareholder calculations under the Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Ashtead

data.title: Highway Thru Hell Reaches 200th Episode Milestone
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc ( (TSE:TBRD) ).

Great Pacific Media, a subsidiary of Thunderbird Entertainment Group, announced that its popular Canadian docuseries, Highway Thru Hell, will air its 200th episode on March 4th on USA Network. This milestone places the series among a select group of long-running factual shows, highlighting its success in capturing the dramatic and challenging work of recovery operators on treacherous highways. The episode will provide an insider look at the ‘Snow Protocol’ during a severe storm, showcasing the critical and heroic efforts of the rescue teams.

More about Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc

Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc is a media company specializing in the production of television content. It operates through its subsidiary, Great Pacific Media, which focuses on creating engaging docuseries and factual entertainment for a global audience.

data.title: Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 PLC Reports Strong Financial Performance and Strategic Growth Initiatives
data.description:
Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 ( (GB:MIG5) ) has shared an announcement.

Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 PLC reported a successful financial year ending November 2024, marked by an increase in NAV total return and a revised dividend policy. The company completed seven profitable private company exits, generating over £10 million in cash proceeds and enhancing shareholder returns. Despite economic uncertainties, Maven’s diversified portfolio strategy has shown resilience, with many holdings achieving market scale and attracting acquisition interest. The company has also launched a new Offer for Subscription to raise additional funds, reflecting confidence in its growth strategy.

More about Maven Income and Growth VCT 5

Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 PLC operates in the venture capital trust industry, focusing on building a diversified portfolio of private companies with high growth potential across various sectors, including cyber security, healthtech, regtech, software, and specialist manufacturing. The company aims to deliver returns to shareholders through strategic investments and exits, with a focus on sectors that have limited exposure to discretionary or consumer spending.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Lion Finance Group PLC Announces Executive Share Option Grants
data.description:
Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ) has issued an announcement.

Lion Finance Group PLC has announced a series of transactions involving the granting of nil-cost options over ordinary shares to its senior executives, as part of their executive equity compensation plan for the 2024 work year. These options, which are deferred shares, will vest over a period of six years, with 40% vesting immediately and the remainder vesting annually in subsequent years, subject to a two-year holding period. This move is indicative of the company’s strategy to align the interests of its management with long-term shareholder value and could enhance the retention of key personnel.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc
